faqs.question: Why was I charged twice this month?
faqs.answer: Duplicate charges can occur due to a system error. Please contact support with your transaction ID and we will investigate and refund the duplicate charge within 5-7 business days.

faqs.question: How do I update my payment method?
faqs.answer: You can update your payment method by going to Account Settings, selecting Billing, and clicking Update Payment Method.

faqs.question: I cannot log into my account.
faqs.answer: Please use the Forgot Password option on the login page. If the issue persists, contact support and we will verify your identity and restore access.

faqs.question: The app is not loading properly.
faqs.answer: Try clearing your browser cache and cookies. If the issue continues, check our status page for any ongoing outages.

faqs.question: Can I share my account with someone else?
faqs.answer: Account sharing is not permitted under our Terms of Service. Each user must have their own account.
